# ============================================================================
# GENERATED BY PARA, PopcornSAR
# Copyright(c) 2024 by PopcornSAR Co.,Ltd. All rights reserved.
# ============================================================================
 
add_executable(${PARA_APP_NAME})
 
# ============================================================================
# This setting is required for binary targets.
# Please modify the section below to suit your configuration.
# ============================================================================
Para_Target(${PARA_APP_NAME}
            PARA_LIBS_PRIVATE core log exec com
            PARA_GEN_DIR ${PARA_APP_GEN_DIR}
            OUTPUT_NAME ${PARA_APP_EXECUTABLE}
)
# ============================================================================
target_include_directories(${PARA_APP_NAME}
                           PRIVATE
                           ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
                           ${OpenCV_INCLUDE_DIRS}
                           ${LITERT_SDK}/include)
# Check if kleidiai library exists (only on ARM platforms)
find_library(KLEIDIAI_LIB kleidiai HINTS "${LITERT_SDK}/lib" NO_DEFAULT_PATH)
if(NOT KLEIDIAI_LIB)
    set(KLEIDIAI_LIB "")
endif()

# Find other required static libraries for static LiteRT linking
find_library(FLATBUFFERS_LIB flatbuffers HINTS "${LITERT_SDK}/lib" NO_DEFAULT_PATH)
find_library(XNNPACK_DELEGATE_LIB xnnpack-delegate HINTS "${LITERT_SDK}/lib" NO_DEFAULT_PATH)
find_library(XNNPACK_MICROKERNELS_LIB xnnpack-microkernels-prod HINTS "${LITERT_SDK}/lib" NO_DEFAULT_PATH)
find_library(GEMMLOWP_GEMM_LIB eight_bit_int_gemm HINTS "${LITERT_SDK}/lib" NO_DEFAULT_PATH)
file(GLOB RUY_LIBS "${LITERT_SDK}/lib/libruy_*.a")

# ============================================================================
target_link_libraries(${PARA_APP_NAME}
                      PRIVATE
                      pthread
                      dl
                      atomic
                      ${OpenCV_LIBS}
                      -Wl,--start-group
                      tensorflow-lite
                      ${XNNPACK_DELEGATE_LIB}
                      ${FLATBUFFERS_LIB}
                      ${RUY_LIBS}
                      XNNPACK
                      ${XNNPACK_MICROKERNELS_LIB}
                      cpuinfo
                      pthreadpool
                      ${GEMMLOWP_GEMM_LIB}
                      ${KLEIDIAI_LIB}
                      farmhash
                      fft2d_fftsg
                      fft2d_fftsg2d
                      -Wl,--end-group
                      absl::log
                      absl::hash
                      absl::flat_hash_set
                      absl::flat_hash_map
                      absl::status)
# ============================================================================
target_sources(${PARA_APP_NAME}
               PRIVATE
               providersensor/aa/port/pport0.cpp
               providersensor/aa/providersensor.cpp
               main.cpp
)

# Set C++17 standard for TFLite compatibility
target_compile_features(${PARA_APP_NAME} PRIVATE cxx_std_17)

# Set rpath so runtime can find TFLite libraries
set_target_properties(${PARA_APP_NAME} PROPERTIES
    BUILD_RPATH "${LITERT_SDK}/lib"
    INSTALL_RPATH "$ORIGIN/../../../lib"
)

# 1. Define the path to the source image file
set(IMAGE_SOURCE_FILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/providersensor/aa/image.jpg")

# Define the path to the GeoJSON map file
set(GEOJSON_SOURCE_FILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/providersensor/aa/carlaMap.geojson")

# 2. Copy the image file to the binary output directory after building ProviderSensor
add_custom_command(TARGET ProviderSensor POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
    "${IMAGE_SOURCE_FILE}"
    $<TARGET_FILE_DIR:ProviderSensor>
    COMMENT "Copying image.jpg to binary directory..."
)

# 3. Install the image file to the opt directory
install(FILES "${IMAGE_SOURCE_FILE}"
        DESTINATION opt/ProviderSensor/bin
        PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)

# Copy hochiminh.geojson to the binary output directory (runtime lookup)
add_custom_command(TARGET ProviderSensor POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
    "${GEOJSON_SOURCE_FILE}"
    $<TARGET_FILE_DIR:ProviderSensor>
    COMMENT "Copying hochiminh.geojson to binary directory..."
)

# Install hochiminh.geojson alongside the binary
install(FILES "${GEOJSON_SOURCE_FILE}"
        DESTINATION opt/ProviderSensor/bin
        PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)

# 4. Copy YOLO e2e model directories to binary output
set(YOLO_E2E_SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/best_yolo26n_e2e_480")
add_custom_command(TARGET ProviderSensor POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
    "${YOLO_E2E_SOURCE_DIR}"
    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:ProviderSensor>/best_yolo26n_e2e_480"
    COMMENT "Copying best_yolo26n_e2e_480 to binary directory..."
)

set(YOLO_416_SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/best_yolo26n_e2e_416")
add_custom_command(TARGET ProviderSensor POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
    "${YOLO_416_SOURCE_DIR}"
    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:ProviderSensor>/best_yolo26n_e2e_416"
    COMMENT "Copying best_yolo26n_e2e_416 to binary directory..."
)

# Copy timer OCR model directory to binary output
set(MYCNN_SOURCE_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/myCNN")
add_custom_command(TARGET ProviderSensor POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
    "${MYCNN_SOURCE_DIR}"
    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:ProviderSensor>/myCNN"
    COMMENT "Copying myCNN (timer OCR) to binary directory..."
)

# Copy fallback test video to binary output
set(TEST_VIDEO_FILE "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test.mp4")
add_custom_command(TARGET ProviderSensor POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different
    "${TEST_VIDEO_FILE}"
    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:ProviderSensor>/test.mp4"
    COMMENT "Copying test.mp4 fallback video to binary directory..."
)

# 5. Install YOLO e2e model, OCR model, and fallback video
install(DIRECTORY "${YOLO_E2E_SOURCE_DIR}"
        DESTINATION opt/ProviderSensor/bin
        FILE_PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)

install(DIRECTORY "${YOLO_416_SOURCE_DIR}"
        DESTINATION opt/ProviderSensor/bin
        FILE_PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)

install(DIRECTORY "${MYCNN_SOURCE_DIR}"
        DESTINATION opt/ProviderSensor/bin
        FILE_PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)

install(FILES "${TEST_VIDEO_FILE}"
        DESTINATION opt/ProviderSensor/bin
        PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)

# Install Execution Manifest
install(FILES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../manifest/exec/ProviderSensor.json"
        DESTINATION etc/exec
        PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)

install(TARGETS ${PARA_APP_NAME} DESTINATION bin)

# Install LiteRT (TFLite) libraries
install(DIRECTORY "${LITERT_SDK}/lib/"
        DESTINATION lib
        FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.so*"
        PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE GROUP_READ WORLD_READ
)
